Los Gatos Cafe Uptown

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.6
📍 Los Gatos, California📅 2026
American Brunch Omelette Cinnamon Roll
Los Gatos Cafe is a local legend in the charming town of Los Gatos, right on the southern edge of Silicon Valley. You’ll find their Uptown location tucked into a corner plaza along Los Gatos Blvd, serving up breakfast and lunch favorites all day from 7:00 AM to 2:30 PM. With white tablecloths on the patio and food served on sleek black ceramic plates, it’s the ultimate go-to for local families—so much so that snagging a table on the weekend is a real feat. The egg dishes are definitely the stars of the show. The California Benedict is a classic, with English muffins stacked high with ham, poached eggs, and avocado, all finished with a rich hollandaise and a dusting of paprika. If you’re into omelets, theirs are impressively fluffy; choose the shrimp and asparagus or the crab packed with avocado and mushrooms. Every plate comes with a side of their signature home fries (pan-fried diced potatoes), cooked until they’re perfectly golden and crisp. You can’t miss the legendary giant cinnamon roll—it comes out warm and dripping with melted cinnamon butter frosting, and it’s definitely big enough for the whole table to share. The cinnamon raisin toast is also toasted to a perfect crunch. For the kiddos, there are bunny-shaped pancakes dusted with powdered sugar and simple options like a single burger patty. Perfect for family gatherings and weekend brunches with the kids.
Good for Family gatherings Weekend brunches with the kids

What I ordered

California Benedict Shrimp Omelette (with Asparagus) Crab Omelette (with Avocado) Ham & Two Eggs Breakfast Platter Signature Cinnamon Roll (with Cinnamon Frosting) Kids' Bunny Pancake Cinnamon Raisin Toast Burger Patty
